title: Germany’s Military Buyers Look to Reduce Caution and Embrace Drones
summary_full: As threats from Moscow rise and support from Washington dwindles, the German military is reinventing how it researches, funds and wields 21st-century arms.
summary_public: As threats from Moscow rise and support from Washington dwindles, the German military is reinventing how it researches, funds and wields 21st-century arms.
